recommendations.title: The Big Hit
recommendations.overview: Etienne, an often out of work but endearing actor, runs a theater workshop in a prison, where he brings  together an unlikely troupe of prisoners to stage Samuel Beckett’s famous play Waiting for Godot. When he is allowed to take the colorful band of

recommendations.title: You People
recommendations.overview: A new couple and their families reckon with modern love amid culture clashes, societal expectations and generational differences.

recommendations.title: The Drama
recommendations.overview: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

recommendations.title: Female Prisoner Scorpion: Jailhouse 41
recommendations.overview: After being used and betrayed by the detective she had fallen in love with, young Matsu is sent to a female prison full of sadistic guards and disobedient prisoners.

recommendations.title: Winter in Wartime
recommendations.overview: During World War II in the freezing winter of 1944-45 the western Netherlands are in the grip of a famine. Many people move east to provide for their families. Fourteen year old Michiel can't wait to join the Dutch resistance, to the dismay of his fa

recommendations.title: Our Folks
recommendations.overview: Two quarreling peasant families, who were forced to leave their lands after the war, are settled by accident on two neighboring farms.

recommendations.title: Pacto de Fuga
recommendations.overview: During the last years of Pinochet's military regime,  a group of militants from the "Manuel Rodríguez Patriotic Front" plan a prison break of political prisoners, through a tunnel that will take them 18 months to dig.

recommendations.title: Devils on the Doorstep
recommendations.overview: During the Japanese occupation of China, two prisoners are dumped in a peasant's home in a small town. The owner is bullied into keeping the prisoners until the next New Year, at which time they will be collected. The village leaders convene to inter

recommendations.title: God's Not Dead: We The People
recommendations.overview: Reverend Dave has to defend himself and a group of Christian homeschooling families after an inspection by local government officials.

recommendations.title: Down by Love
recommendations.overview: A man, a woman. A prison director, his inmate. An impossible love, a true story.
